_doc: Damage-bounded variant: top-10 fused chunks frozen, graph re-sorts only the tail. Dev: the one genuine retrieval-shape change (R@20 +0.016, multi-primary R@20 +0.031, flat nDCG/pMRR) but sentinel coverage pays (-0.062) — the boosted files' fetched chunks displace sentinel-bearing chunks from the top-20 pack. Pinned for the held-out report of record.
